question.text: For how long must a DP maintain copies of Pledge Request Forms (PRF), Unpledge Request Forms (URF) and Invocation Request Forms (IRF)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The DP shall maintain copies of all PRF, URF and IRF for a minimum period of 5 years or any such period informed by SEBI/NSDL/CDSL from time to time. **The Trap:** 7 years is a common retention period for tax records, making option (c) tempting. **Cross-Exam Context:** Record retention periods are frequently tested across NISM certifications. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Implement a systematic document retention policy to ensure compliance with the 5-year minimum requirement.
